vibe: Late-night Tokyo drift — deep house warmth, city pop nostalgia, UK jazz energy, electronic cumbia rhythms, and math rock precision

tracks.name: Caged Bird
tracks.reason: You've been deep in Moodymann and Peggy Gou territory — Kerri Chandler's Full Vocal Mix is the OG deep house soulfulness that inspired all of them.

tracks.name: Fly-day Chinatown
tracks.reason: You've been vibing with Miharu Koshi and Shuya Okino — Yasuha's synth-pop city pop classic is that same late-night Tokyo energy, just from 1984.

tracks.name: 81Summer
tracks.reason: You know Nujabes well, but Uyama Hiroto's solo work hits different — warmer, jazzier, like Nujabes' spirit channeled through a saxophone.

tracks.name: EoO
tracks.reason: From the latest Bad Bunny album — stripped-back reggaeton that leans more into the Puerto Rican countryside vibe. Good palette cleanser between the electronic cuts.

tracks.name: Raisins Under the Sun (feat. Shabaka Hutchings)
tracks.reason: You love Tom Misch's jazz-funk side — Yussef Dayes takes that energy and pushes it into spiritual jazz territory with Shabaka on sax. Absolute heat.

tracks.name: Washed Away
tracks.reason: With Blue Hawaii and &ME in your top tracks, you're clearly into that ethereal electronic space. Kelela floats over ambient club production — same orbit, different galaxy.

tracks.name: What Am I to Do?
tracks.reason: UK jazz that actually makes you want to move. If you're into the Tom Misch and Yussef Dayes world, Ezra Collective is the missing piece — Afrobeat meets London jazz.

tracks.name: tremolo+delay
tracks.album: the book about my idle plot on a vague anxiety
tracks.reason: Japanese math rock at its most beautiful. With your love of Japanese music and intricate production, toe's shimmering guitar work is the instrumental equivalent of a late-night Shibuya walk.

tracks.name: Cumbia del Olvido
tracks.reason: You've got Omar Souleyman in your top tracks — Nicola Cruz does the same thing but with Andean and cumbia roots. Electronic meets ancient rhythms, proper global club music.

tracks.name: High Point On Low Ground
tracks.reason: Perfect closer — Palms Trax makes deep house that feels like sunrise after a long night out. Connects to your Floating Points and Hunee plays, but with a warmer, more melodic touch.
